title: cyanocephalus tagetifolius
intro: Cyanocephalus tagetifolius, commonly known as the "blue-headed tagetes," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyanocephalus tagetifolius include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations involving the use of the leaves, stems, and flowers to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
